note: A hand-curated set of datasets that New York City newsrooms rely on most. Not exhaustive. Selection is editorial, not algorithmic. See methodology page for criteria.

picks.why: Every reported crime, going back to 2006. The backbone of most NYC public-safety reporting.
picks.common_use: Trend analysis by precinct, neighborhood, or crime type
picks.gotcha: Date by RPT_DT (report date), not CMPLT_FR_DT.

picks.why: NYPD complaint data, year-to-date — current crime trends.
picks.common_use: Short-window stories on shootings, robberies, etc.
picks.gotcha: Updated quarterly; not real time.

picks.why: NYPD shooting incidents — every reported shooting since 2006.
picks.gotcha: Marked ARCHIVED in 2024; check for current-year companion.

picks.why: Every NYPD arrest, with charge, demographics, location.
picks.gotcha: Race categories follow NYPD coding, not Census.

picks.why: Every motor-vehicle crash reported to NYPD since 2012 — the source for Vision Zero stories.
picks.gotcha: Latitude/longitude can be off; verify against street name.

picks.why: Per-person crash records — link to crashes table by collision_id.
picks.gotcha: Joins to Crashes on COLLISION_ID.

picks.why: 311 complaints from 2020 to present — the canonical 'pulse of the city' dataset.
picks.gotcha: Volume is huge; filter by complaint type and ZIP.

picks.why: Department of Buildings job applications — every construction project filed in NYC.
picks.gotcha: DOB NOW dataset is the modern companion.

picks.why: DOB NOW approved permits — current construction activity.
picks.gotcha: Excludes electrical/elevator filings (separate datasets).

picks.why: ACRIS Real Property Master — every recorded NYC deed.
picks.gotcha: Joins to Legals (parcel) and Parties (people) on document_id.

picks.why: ACRIS Legals — links deeds to parcels (BBL).
picks.gotcha: Use BBL = borough+block+lot, padded.

picks.why: ACRIS Parties — buyers and sellers behind every deed.
picks.common_use: Identifying who actually owns property (LLCs, individuals)
picks.gotcha: Names are typed by clerks; expect spelling variants.

picks.why: PLUTO — every NYC tax lot, with land use, owner, zoning, building age.
picks.gotcha: Updated quarterly; check release version.

picks.why: Every marshal-executed eviction in NYC.
picks.gotcha: Excludes voluntary move-outs and warrants not executed.

picks.why: Every affordable-housing project HPD has financed since 2014.
picks.gotcha: Counts buildings, not units.

picks.why: HPD housing-code violations — the canonical bad-landlord dataset.
picks.gotcha: Open vs closed status matters; same building can have hundreds.

picks.why: DOHMH restaurant inspections, with letter grades.
picks.gotcha: A restaurant can have multiple inspections; pick latest by inspection_date.

picks.why: School Quality Reports — DOE's official school-by-school metrics.
picks.gotcha: Methodology changes by year; don't compare across years naively.

picks.why: Every city employee's payroll, by name.
picks.gotcha: FY data; some agencies (NYPD detectives) redact specific titles.

picks.why: Active civil-service eligibility lists.
picks.gotcha: Includes candidates who may never be hired.

picks.why: Mayor's Management Report indicators — the official agency report card.
picks.gotcha: Indicators change between mayors; compare cautiously.

picks.why: Every campaign contribution to NYC candidates.
picks.gotcha: Use FILING_NUMBER and ELECTION_CYCLE to scope.

picks.why: Every campaign expenditure — the spending side of CFB data.
picks.gotcha: Some payees use d/b/a names.

picks.why: City Clerk lobbyist filings — who lobbies whom on what.
picks.gotcha: Self-reported; subjects often vague.

picks.why: Daily snapshot of every person in DOC custody.
picks.gotcha: Daily snapshot; not a longitudinal record.

picks.why: NYPD hate crimes, by motivation and bias category.
picks.gotcha: Confirmed vs reported; small-N caveats apply.

picks.why: NYPD use-of-force incidents.
picks.gotcha: Subject and officer identifiers are masked.

picks.why: Air quality and asthma indicators by neighborhood.
picks.gotcha: Geography is UHF42, not ZIP or community district.

picks.why: Bike counts at key locations across the city.
picks.gotcha: Marked Historical; a current-year companion may exist.

picks.why: OMB's official capital-spending plan — what the City says it will build.
picks.gotcha: Plan vs. actual differs sharply; cross-check with capital actuals.
